name: Crazy Math Quick Test
description: Crazy Math Quik Games - Tricky Riddles is an addictive free puzzle & math game with a series of tricky riddles and teasers for training the brain. Interesting riddles and tricky tests will improve your mind. Train your memory and improve cognitive abilities with our fun and challenging mobile game. With personalized progress tracking, youll see your memory skills improve over time. Free multiplication games suitable for every age group, from school kids to adults and even seniors. Practice different mental skills and get smarter with our logic apps, and add games for your mind.
